expressive_capabilities.description: Dynamic timbral shifts via operator EG to carrier frequency ratio changes.
Per-operator key-on and independent frequency control for Channel 3 operators (OP1-OP4). Permits 4 independent notes in one channel.
Direct sample PCM playback via 8-bit DAC register ($2A).

constraints.description: Serial DAC output creates 'staircase' quantization noise if not filtered.
constraints.result: the characteristic Sega Genesis 'gritty' FM sound.

constraints.description: Internal math and accumulator resolution limits total dynamic range.
constraints.clipping: prone at high operator feedback levels.
